description: Append-only audit trail for every inbound Wave webhook and every processing step it triggers.

fields.description: UUID that links every row produced by one webhook from receipt through completion.
fields.label: Correlation ID

fields.description: Which pipeline stage emitted this row.

Free-form telemetry tag for the pipeline stage that wrote this row. Canonical webhook stages: Received, Authenticated, Enqueued, Processing, Resolved Customer, Resolved Items, SO Created, SO Updated, Outbound Sent, Completed, Skipped, Failed, Action Required. Pipeline-specific tags are also valid, e.g. stock_sync_push_attempt, stock_sync_resync_requested, order_status_push_failed — adding a new pipeline does not require a schema change.
fields.label: Step

fields.description: Severity of this row. Used by dashboards and retention policy.
fields.label: Level

fields.description: Wave entity the webhook targets, e.g. CUSTOMER, ORDER.
fields.label: Wave Doc Type

fields.description: Wave action, e.g. CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE.
fields.label: Action

fields.description: Wave payload _id (primary key on Wave's side).
fields.label: Wave ID

fields.description: Wave payload `updatedAt` value. Used by the processor to skip re-processing identical (wave_id, updated_at) pairs.
fields.label: Wave Updated At

fields.description: ERP DocType touched by this step, if any.
fields.label: Linked DocType

fields.description: ERP document name touched by this step, if any.
fields.label: Linked Name

fields.description: Wall time this step took, in milliseconds. Useful for spotting slow outbound calls.
fields.label: Duration (ms)

fields.description: JSON snapshot of the inbound request body or the data the step operated on.
fields.label: Request Body

fields.description: JSON snapshot of the outbound response, the resolved ERP record, or other step output.
fields.label: Response Body

fields.description: One-line error summary. Empty unless level is Error.
fields.label: Error Message

fields.description: Full Python traceback, if one was captured.
fields.label: Stack Trace

name: Wave Sync Log
